metadata.name: slip
metadata.description: No-admin settlement for World Cup rules. TxLINE proofs settle football slips on Solana.

errors.name: BadState
errors.msg: Market is not in the required state

errors.name: ClaimNotOpen
errors.msg: Proof timestamp is before the market resolution boundary

errors.name: ProofBeforeEntryDeadline
errors.msg: TxLINE proof predates the market entry deadline

errors.name: SettlementWindowClosed
errors.msg: The proof-settlement window has closed

errors.name: VoidNotReached
errors.msg: Market is not yet eligible to void

errors.name: BpsTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee or tip exceeds the configured ceiling

errors.name: WrongRootsAccount
errors.msg: TxLINE roots account owner or PDA is wrong

errors.name: ProofInvalid
errors.msg: Merkle proof does not fold to the anchored TxLINE root

errors.name: FixtureMismatch
errors.msg: Proof fixture does not match the market expression

errors.name: EpochDayMismatch
errors.msg: Proof epoch day does not match the roots account

errors.name: MissingSecondStat
errors.msg: Expression and proof disagree about the second stat

errors.name: StatKeyMismatch
errors.msg: Proof stat key does not match the market expression

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: EntryClosed
errors.msg: Entry deadline has passed

errors.name: BadNumeric
errors.msg: Numeric value is outside the supported range

errors.name: InvalidTerms
errors.msg: Expression does not map to canonical TxLINE stat metadata

errors.name: FixtureNotFinal
errors.msg: TxLINE proof is not from a terminal match update

errors.name: StakeBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Ticket stake is below the one-token minimum

errors.name: WrongMintDecimals
errors.msg: Settlement mint must use six decimals

errors.name: LosingTicket
errors.msg: Only a ticket on the winning outcome may claim

errors.name: TicketAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Ticket was already claimed

errors.name: InvalidOutcomes
errors.msg: Market needs 2–5 named outcomes and a complete contiguous band partition

errors.name: InvalidOutcomeIndex
errors.msg: Outcome index is outside this market

errors.name: WrongSettlementMode
errors.msg: This instruction does not match the market settlement mode

fields.name: resolution_evidence_hash
docs: Domain-separated SHA-256 commitment to the exact proof instruction evidence.

fields.name: claimed_stake
docs: Claimed winning stake for resolved markets, or total claimed stake for voided markets.

types.name: MarketExpression
docs: The one value every named outcome partitions. One or two canonical TxLINE leaves prove it.

types.name: MultiProof
docs: TxLINE `/api/scores/stat-validation-v3` proof. Non-empty stat proofs are the
service's compressed zero-value witnesses; the indexed multiproof commits the
ordinary stat leaves used for settlement. Slip only consumes expression stats
that are present in the indexed multiproof, so it never guesses at the private

types.name: OutcomeBand
docs: A complete integer partition may map several disjoint bands to the same named outcome. This is
what makes predicates such as "draw / not draw" expressible without a separate binary primitive.

types.name: ScoresProof
docs: One score-validation proof: one or two stats from the SAME update (shared `event_stat_root`),
folded up the fixture sub-tree and the daily main tree.
